name: termina
description: A text-based multiplayer MOBA played through a terminal-inspired browser UI

scripts.test:e2e:ci: cairn run tests/e2e/flows --config tests/e2e/cairntrace.config.yml --cold-start --backend playwright --parallel 2 --junit tests/e2e/junit.xml --stamp-if-green
scripts.test:db: docker compose up -d --wait && (docker compose exec -T postgres psql -U termina -c 'CREATE DATABASE termina_test' 2>/dev/null || true) && (docker compose exec -T redis redis-cli -n 1 flushdb || true) && DATABASE_URL=postgresql://termina:termina@localhost:5433/termina_test drizzle-kit push --force
scripts.serve:test: HOST=127.0.0.1 PORT=3000 TERMINA_TEST_HOOKS=1 TERMINA_DISABLE_RATE_LIMIT=1 TERMINA_TEST_FAST_GAME=8 NUXT_SESSION_COOKIE_SECURE=false NUXT_SESSION_PASSWORD=test_session_password_at_least_32_chars_long NUXT_DATABASE_URL=postgresql://termina:termina@localhost:5433/termina_test NUXT_REDIS_URL=redis://localhost:6380/1 node .output/server/index.mjs
scripts.test:server: hitspec run collections/ --no-history && cairn run tests/e2e/flows --config tests/e2e/cairntrace.config.yml --parallel 4
scripts.test:all: bun run test:db && TEST_DATABASE_URL=postgresql://termina:termina@localhost:5433/termina_test vitest run && bun run build && start-server-and-test 'bun run serve:test' http://127.0.0.1:3000 'bun run test:server'
scripts.prepare: if git rev-parse --is-inside-work-tree >/dev/null 2>&1; then lefthook install; fi
